Product Description

Step into elegance with this beautifully crafted Lehenga Choli suit set. The gown boasts a dramatic flare and premium inner lining for maximum comfort during long events. Complete with a matching pant and an embroidered shawl-style dupatta, this outfit is designed to make a statement at weddings and festive gatherings.

Top (Koti & Choli)

Koti Fabric & Inner: Made from premium pure cotton fabric layered with a soft micro cotton inner lining.

Koti Work: Features heavy traditional Gamthi work, mirror lace accents, and decorative sikka (coin) lace.

Choli Fabric & Work: Crafted from pure cotton fabric adorned with coordinating heavy Gamthi embroidery work and a comfortable micro cotton inner.

Fit & Sizing: Delivered fully stitched and available in sizes XS to XXL.

Bottom (Lehenga)

Fabric & Lining: Woven from high-quality pure cotton fabric layered with a smooth micro cotton inner lining.

Work & Volume: Detailed with delicate ribbon lace accents and tailored into a grand 9-meter flare layout for a striking festive silhouette.

Size: Completely full-stitched in size 44.

Wash Instructions

First Wash: Dry clean recommended to maintain the fabric texture and sequence work.

Subsequent Washes: Gentle hand wash separately in cold water using a mild liquid detergent.

Care Advice: Do not wring or twist. Dry in shade away from direct sunlight to prevent color fading. Iron on low heat on the reverse side only.
